description_long: This jewelry object consists of two distinct pieces: a coiled, silvery metallic ring and a more ornate, pink and gold decorative element. The coiled ring appears to be made of tightly wound, smooth metal strands, forming a spherical or bun-like shape with a hollow center. The second component features a vibrant magenta structure with intricate curves and a small, faceted yellow gemstone set into a gold mount. The pink element is adorned with delicate metallic accents and appears to be attached or paired with the coiled ring. The overall design is visually striking, combining industrial metallic textures with colorful, ornamental details. The contrast between the minimalist coil and the elaborate pink and gold motif creates a unique, eye-catching piece.
description: A coiled silver metallic ring paired with an ornate pink and gold decorative element featuring a yellow gemstone. The design contrasts industrial simplicity with vibrant, intricate ornamentation.
description_view_0: The coiled silver ring is prominent, with the pink and gold decorative element clearly visible above and to the right.
description_view_1: The coiled ring is seen from the side, with the pink and gold element mostly out of view, emphasizing the metallic texture.
description_view_2: The pink and gold decorative element is in the foreground, with the coiled ring in the background, highlighting the gemstone and intricate details.
description_view_3: The coiled ring is shown from the back, with the pink and gold element visible to the left, offering a clear view of both components' profiles.
